headline: Iran Puts a Match to Oil Markets as Wall Street's Tech Giants Buckle Under Rate Pressure
summary: Oil crossed back above $100 a barrel as Iran–US diplomacy showed its cracks, a climbing 10-year yield hammered the tech sector, and fresh redemption gates at two of the largest private credit funds raised uncomfortable questions about liquidity in a $1.8 trillion market. Tuesday delivered more than enough to keep investors on their toes heading into Wednesday's session.

raw.headline: Iran Puts a Match to Oil Markets as Wall Street's Tech Giants Buckle Under Rate Pressure
raw.summary: Oil crossed back above $100 a barrel as Iran–US diplomacy showed its cracks, a climbing 10-year yield hammered the tech sector, and fresh redemption gates at two of the largest private credit funds raised uncomfortable questions about liquidity in a $1.8 trillion market. Tuesday delivered more than enough to keep investors on their toes heading into Wednesday's session.
